description: Turn the current DocOS skeleton into a runnable PDF-first alpha with persisted artifacts, deterministic IDs, patch-driven wiki updates, a recoverable review flow, and regression coverage.

userStories.title: Create a real run manifest during ingest
userStories.description: As a DocOS operator, I want `docos ingest <file> --run` to create a real run record so that every downstream artifact can be traced to a stable `run_id`.
acceptanceCriteria: `docos ingest <file> --run` prints JSON containing `source_id`, `run_id`, `status`, and `artifactRoot`
A run manifest file is written for the new `run_id` and includes ordered pipeline stages with initial statuses
The run manifest stores the linked `source_id` and source file path

userStories.title: Persist and reload run manifests
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want the run store to reload manifests after restart so that `run_id` lookup is recoverable across process restarts.
acceptanceCriteria: The run store can load a previously written manifest by `run_id` after a fresh process start
A missing `run_id` returns a structured not-found error instead of a placeholder string
Run manifest persistence is covered by automated tests
